features: Packaging Includes: You will receive 12 exquisite mini gift bags, each featuring a handle cord and satin ribbon. Ample quantity to meet all your packaging needs.
Premium Material: The small bags are crafted from high-quality thick paper, which is sturdy and resistant to deformation, ensuring reliable weight-bearing capacity and keeping contents safe.

Elegant Gold Trim Design: The simple yet sophisticated white body, paired with delicate gold-edged accents, exudes a premium feel. Perfect for both corporate gifting and private parties, it adds a touch of distinctive elegance.

Ideal Size: The thank you gift bags measuring 14x6x12 cm (5.51×2.36×4.72 inches), the compact design easily accommodates small gifts, cosmetics, jewelry, candies, and more, making it both portable and practical.

Versatile Use: These gift bags are suitable for Birthdays, Weddings, Christmas, Valentine’s Day, and other special occasions. They also work great as event favors or retail packaging, effortlessly enhancing the sense of occasion for any gift.
description: Product Description MINI GIFT BAGS You will receive 12 exquisite mini gift bags, each with a handle and ribbon. This generous quantity meets your diverse packaging needs. These gift bags are ideal for birthdays, weddings, Christmas, Valentine's Day, and other special occasions. They can also be used for brand events or retail, enhancing the gift's sense of ceremony. PERFECTLY SIZED The mini gift bags measure: 14 x 12 x 6 cm (5.5 x 4.7 x 2.3 inches). The small-capacity design makes the gift bag look more refined and stylish. It can easily hold small gifts, cosmetics, jewelry, candy, snacks, and more, making it compact and practical. INSTRUCTIONS First, take out a gift bag. Next, hold the sides of the gift bag and squeeze it toward the center, making the two right angles meet in the middle of the bottom. Next, thread the handle through the pre-designed circular hole. Finally, thread the ribbon through the long hole at the top of the gift bag and tie with a beautiful bow to complete the package. WIDELY APPLICABLE
